title: protium fragrans
intro: Protium fragrans, also known as elemi, is a plant species belonging to the family Burseraceae. It is native to the Philippines and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of Protium fragrans include essential oils, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
